prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response: Verily, in the third quarter of this most bewildering year, the noble company of "Cloudsoft" didst report a surge in revenues, borne aloft on the wings of their mystical "subscription model", which doth bring forth a steady stream of gold coins from the ether.
